message:
fix(egraph): correct round-trip variable mapping after equality saturation reordering

Fix egraph_to_jaxpr to parse Symbol names (e.g. v0, v1) to recover
original VarIds instead of assuming positional correspondence with
invars. After commutativity rewrites during equality saturation,
Symbol nodes may appear in any order in the extracted RecExpr, breaking
the previous positional mapping.

Fix id_to_atom to recognize f64:{bits} encoded symbols and decode them
back to Atom::Lit(Literal::F64Bits(...)) instead of treating them as
variable references.

Add three regression tests: round_trip_add2_asymmetric_args (detects
swapped inputs after commutativity), round_trip_square_plus_linear
(shared variable with literal), round_trip_with_f64_literal (f64 literal
encoding round-trip).

Fix CalibrationReport::observe to clamp predicted values to [0.0, 1.0]
before bin index computation, preventing out-of-range predictions from
causing incorrect binning.

Update Cargo.lock with new workspace crate dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
